ddls:
CREATE TABLE "specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the specialty */,
  "abridged_description" TEXT /* Shorter, more concise description for quick reference */,
  "required_education" TEXT /* Educational requirements for the specialty */,
  "residency_duration" INTEGER /* Typical duration of residency training in years */,
  "board_certification" INTEGER /* Whether board certification is required */,
  "average_training_cost" TEXT /* Average cost of training for the specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physician_stats" (
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physician statistic entry */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specialty */,
  "num_physicians" INTEGER /* Number of physicians in the specialty */,
  "avg_salary" TEXT /* Average salary of physicians in the specialty */,
  "num_residents" INTEGER /* Number of residents in the specialty */,
  "avg_age" TEXT /* Average age of physicians in the specialty */,
  "avg_experience" TEXT /* Average years of experience of physicians in the specialty */,
  "avg_training_cost" TEXT /* Average cost of training for physicians in the specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("physician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physician_stats_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satisfaction_levels" (
  "satisfaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satisfaction level entry */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specialty */,
  "medicine_satisfaction" TEXT /* Satisfaction level with medicine as a career choice */,
  "income_satisfaction" TEXT /* Satisfaction level with income */,
  "specialty_satisfaction" TEXT /* Satisfaction level with the specialty */,
  "work_environment_satisfaction" TEXT /* Satisfaction level with the work environment */,
  "peer_relationship_satisfaction" TEXT /* Satisfaction level with peer relationships */,
  "patient_relationship_satisfaction" TEXT /* Satisfaction level with patient relationships */,
  "career_advancement_satisfaction" TEXT /* Satisfaction level with career advancement opportunities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satisfaction_levels_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_life_balance" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work-life balance entry */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specialty */,
  "total_work_hours" TEXT /* Average total work hours per week */,
  "burned_out" TEXT /* Percentage of physicians feeling burned out */,
  "fewer_friends" TEXT /* Percentage of physicians with fewer friends */,
  "average_weekend_work_hours" TEXT /* Average number of hours worked on weekends */,
  "average_vacation_days" TEXT /* Average number of vacation days per year */,
  "flexibility_rating" TEXT /* Rating of work flexibility (0-1) */,
  "remote_work_options" INTEGER /* Whether remote work options are available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_life_balance_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_health" (
  "mental_health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mental health entry */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specialty */,
  "seek_help" TEXT /* Percentage of physicians seeking help */,
  "happiest_at_work" TEXT /* Percentage of physicians reporting happiness at work */,
  "depression_and_burnout" TEXT /* Percentage of physicians experiencing depression and burnout */,
  "stress_levels" TEXT /* Average stress levels reported by physicians */,
  "anxiety_levels" TEXT /* Average anxiety levels reported by physicians */,
  "suicide_awareness" TEXT /* Percentage of physicians aware of suicide prevention resources */,
  "wellness_programs" INTEGER /* Whether the specialty has wellness programs in place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mental_health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_health_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specialty */,
  "men" INTEGER /* Number of male physicians in the specialty */,
  "women" INTEGER /* Number of female physicians in the specialty */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ages */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicities */,
  "nationality_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of nationalities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialty_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison entry */,
  "specialty_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first specialty */,
  "specialty_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second specialty */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., salary, satisfaction level) */,
  "comparison_score" TEXT /* A score indicating the result of the comparison */,
  "comparison_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the comparison result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specialty_comparisons_specialty_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id_1") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specialty_comparisons_specialty_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id_2") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "publications" TEXT /* List of notable publications by the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who made the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., Data Addition, Correction) */,
  "affected_tables" TEXT /* List of tables affected by the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
